rationale: Gov't Code §2001.091 governs discovery procedures in contested agency cases. It has no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; the proposed increase neither alters nor is constrained by discovery rules.
quote: Sec. 2001.091. DISCOVERY FROM PARTIES: ORDERS FOR PRODUCTION OR INSPECTION.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses contested-case discovery only.
